translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the tent of meeting, on the first of the second month, in the second year of their going out of the land of Egypt, saying:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Take ye up the sum of all the company of the sons of Israel by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names -- every male by their polls;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host in Israel, ye do number them by their hosts, thou and Aaron;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and with you there is a man for a tribe, each is a head to the house of his fathers.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And these [are] the names of the men who stand with you: 'For Reuben -- Elizur son of Shedeur.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Simeon -- Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Judah -- Nahshon son of Amminadab.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Issachar -- Nathaneel son of Zuar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Zebulun -- Eliab son of Helon.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For the sons of Joseph -- for Ephraim: Elishama son of Ammihud: for Manasseh -- Gamaliel son of Pedahzur.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Benjamin -- Abidan son of Gideoni.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Dan -- Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Asher -- Pagiel son of Ocran.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Gad -- Eliasaph son of Deuel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For Naphtali -- Ahira son of Enan.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those called of the company, princes of the tribes of their fathers; they [are] heads of the thousands of Israel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses taketh -- Aaron also -- these men, who were defined by name,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and all the company they assembled on the first of the second month, and they declare their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names from a son of twenty years and upward, by their polls,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: as Jehovah hath commanded Moses; and he numbereth them in the wilderness of Sinai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Reuben, Israel's first-born -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, by their polls, every male from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Reuben, are six and forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Simeon -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, its numbered ones in the number of names, by their polls, every male from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Simeon, [are] nine and fifty thousand and three hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Gad -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Gad, [are] five and forty thousand and six hundred and fifty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Judah -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Judah, [are] four and seventy thousand and six hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Issachar -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Issachar, [are] four and fifty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Zebulun -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Zebulun, [are] seven and fifty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Joseph -- of the sons of Ephraim -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Ephraim, [are] forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Manasseh -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Manasseh, [are] two and thirty thousand and two hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Benjamin -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Benjamin, [are] five and thirty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Dan -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Dan, [are] two and sixty thousand and seven hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of the sons of Asher -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Asher, [are] one and forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: [Of] the sons of Naphtali -- their births, by their families, by the house of their fathers, in the number of names, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: their numbered ones, for the tribe of Naphtali, [are] three and fifty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those numbered, whom Moses numbered -- Aaron also, and the princes of Israel, twelve men -- each for the house of his fathers, they have been.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And they are, all those numbered of the sons of Israel, by the house of their fathers, from a son of twenty years and upward, every one going out to the host in Israel,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: yea, all those numbered are six hundred thousand, and three thousand, and five hundred and fifty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the Levites, for the tribe of their fathers, have not numbered themselves in their midst,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: seeing Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Only, the tribe of Levi thou dost not number, and their sum thou dost not take up in the midst of the sons of Israel;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou, appoint the Levites over the tabernacle of the testimony, and over all its vessels, and over all that it hath; they bear the tabernacle, and all its vessels, and they serve it; and round about the tabernacle they encamp.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And in the journeying of the tabernacle, the Levites take it down, and in the encamping of the tabernacle, the Levites raise it up; and the stranger who is coming near is put to death.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Israel have encamped, each by his camp, and each by his standard, by their hosts;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the Levites encamp round about the tabernacle of the testimony; and there is no wrath on the company of the sons of Israel, and the Levites have kept the charge of the tabernacle of the testimony.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Israel do according to all that Jehovah hath commanded Moses; so they have done.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, and unto Aaron, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Each by his standard, with ensigns of the house of their fathers, do the sons of Israel encamp; over-against round about the tent of meeting they encamp.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those encamping eastward towards the sun-rising, [are of] the standard of the camp of Judah, by their hosts; and the prince of the sons of Judah [is] Nahshon, son of Amminadab;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] four and seventy thousand and six hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those encamping by him [are of] the tribe of Issachar; and the prince of the sons of Issachar [is] Nethaneel son of Zuar;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and its numbered ones, [are] four and fifty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The tribe of Zebulun; and the prince of the sons of Zebulun [is] Eliab son of Helon;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and its numbered ones, [are] seven and fifty thousand and four hundred;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: all those numbered of the camp of Judah [are] a hundred thousand, and eighty thousand, and six thousand, and four hundred, by their hosts; they journey first.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The standard of the camp of Reuben [is] southward, by their hosts; and the prince of the sons of Reuben [is] Elizur son of Shedeur;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and its numbered ones, [are] six and forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those encamping by him [are of] the tribe of Simeon; and the prince of the sons of Simeon [is] Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] nine and fifty thousand and three hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the tribe of Gad; and the prince of the sons of Gad [is] Eliasaph son of Reuel;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] five and forty thousand and six hundred and fifty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All those numbered of the camp of Reuben [are] a hundred thousand, and one and fifty thousand, and four hundred and fifty, by their hosts; and they journey second.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the tent of meeting -- the camp of the Levites -- hath journeyed in the midst of the camps; as they encamp so they journey, each at his station by their standards.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The standard of the camp of Ephraim, by their hosts, [is] westward; and the prince of the sons of Ephraim [is] Elishama son of Ammihud;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And by him [is] the tribe of Manasseh; and the prince of the sons of Manasseh [is] Gamaliel son of Pedahzur;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] two and thirty thousand, and two hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the tribe of Benjamin; and the prince of the sons of Benjamin [is] Abidan son of Gideoni;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] five and thirty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All those numbered of the camp of Ephraim [are] a hundred thousand, and eight thousand, and a hundred, by their hosts; and they journey third.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The standard of the camp of Dan [is] northward, by their hosts; and the prince of the sons of Dan [is] Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] two and sixty thousand and seven hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those encamping by him [are of] the tribe of Asher; and the prince of the sons of Asher [is] Pagiel son of Ocran;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] one and forty thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the tribe of Naphtali; and the prince of the sons of Naphtali [is] Ahira son of Enan;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and his host, and their numbered ones, [are] three and fifty thousand and four hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All those numbered of the camp of Dan [are] a hundred thousand, and seven and fifty thousand, and six hundred; at the rear they journey, by their standards.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those numbered of the sons of Israel by the house of their fathers; all those numbered of the camps by their hosts [are] six hundred thousand, and three thousand, and five hundred and fifty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the Levites have not numbered themselves in the midst of the sons of Israel, as Jehovah hath commanded Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Israel do according to all that Jehovah hath commanded Moses; so they have encamped by their standards, and so they have journeyed; each by his families, by the house of his fathers.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And these [are] births of Aaron and Moses, in the day of Jehovah's speaking with Moses in mount Sinai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And these [are] the names of the sons of Aaron: the first-born Nadab, and Abihu, Eleazar, and Ithamar;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: these [are] the names of the sons of Aaron, the anointed priests, whose hand he hath consecrated for acting as priest.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Nadab dieth -- Abihu also -- before Jehovah, in their bringing near strange fire before Jehovah, in the wilderness of Sinai, and sons they had not; and Eleazar -- Ithamar also -- acteth as priest in the presence of Aaron their father.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Bring near the tribe of Levi, and thou hast caused it to stand before Aaron the priest, and they have served him,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and kept his charge, and the charge of all the company before the tent of meeting, to do the service of the tabernacle;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have kept all the vessels of the tent of meeting, and the charge of the sons of Israel, to do the service of the tabernacle;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast given the Levites to Aaron and to his sons; they are surely given to him out of the sons of Israel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And Aaron and his sons thou dost appoint, and they have kept their priesthood, and the stranger who cometh near is put to death.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And I, lo, I have taken the Levites from the midst of the sons of Israel instead of every first-born opening a womb among the sons of Israel, and the Levites have been Mine;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for Mine [is] every first-born, in the day of My smiting every first-born in the land of Egypt I have sanctified to Myself every first-born in Israel, from man unto beast; Mine they are; I [am] Jehovah.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Number the sons of Levi by the house of their fathers, by their families; every male from a son of a month and upward thou dost number them.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses numbereth them according to the command of Jehovah, as he hath been commanded.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And these are sons of Levi by their names: Gershon, and Kohath, and Merari.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And these [are] the names of the sons of Gershon by their families: Libni and Shimei.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Kohath, by their families, [are] Amram and Izhar, Hebron and Uzziel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Merari by their families [are] Mahli and Mushi; these are the families of the Levites, by the house of their fathers.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of Gershon [is] the family of the Libnite, and the family of the Shimite; these are the families of the Gershonite.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Their numbered ones, in number, every male from a son of a month and upward, their numbered ones [are] seven thousand and five hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The families of the Gershonite, behind the tabernacle, do encamp westward.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the prince of a father's house for the Gershonite [is] Eliasaph son of Lael.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the charge of the sons of Gershon in the tent of meeting [is] the tabernacle, and the tent, its covering, and the vail at the opening of the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the hangings of the court, and the vail at the opening of the court, which [is] by the tabernacle and by the altar round about, and its cords, to all its service.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And of Kohath [is] the family of the Amramite, and the family of the Izharite, and the family of the Hebronite, and the family of the Uzzielite; these are families of the Kohathite.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: In number, all the males, from a son of a month and upward, [are] eight thousand and six hundred, keeping the charge of the sanctuary.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The families of the sons of Kohath encamp by the side of the tabernacle southward.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the prince of a father's house for the families of the Kohathite [is] Elizaphan son of Uzziel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And their charge [is] the ark, and the table, and the candlestick, and the altars, and the vessels of the sanctuary with which they serve, and the vail, and all its service.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And [to] the prince of the princes of the Levites, Eleazar son of Aaron the priest, [is] the oversight of the keepers of the charge of the sanctuary.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Of Merari [is] the family of the Mahlite, and the family of the Mushite; these [are] the families of Merari.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And their numbered ones, in number, all the males from a son of a month and upward, [are] six thousand and two hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the prince of a father's house for the families of Merari [is] Zuriel son of Abihail; by the side of the tabernacle they encamp northward.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the oversight -- the charge of the sons of Merari -- [is] the boards of the tabernacle, and its bars, and its pillars, and its sockets, and all its vessels, and all its service,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those encamping before the tabernacle eastward, before the tent of meeting, at the east, [are] Moses and Aaron, and his sons, keeping the charge of the sanctuary for the charge of the sons of Israel, and the stranger who cometh near is put to death.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All those numbered of the Levites whom Moses numbered -- Aaron also -- by the command of Jehovah, by their families, every male from a son of a month and upward, [are] two and twenty thousand.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah saith unto Moses, 'Number every first-born male of the sons of Israel from a son of a month and upward, and take up the number of their names;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast taken the Levites for Me (I [am] Jehovah), instead of every first-born among the sons of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of every firstling among the cattle of the sons of Israel.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses numbereth, as Jehovah hath commanded him, all the first-born among the sons of Israel.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And all the first-born -- male -- by the number of names, from a son of a month and upward, of their numbered ones, are two and twenty thousand two hundred and seventy and three.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Take the Levites instead of every first-born among the sons of Israel, and the cattle of the Levites instead of their cattle; and the Levites have been Mine; I [am] Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And [from] those ransomed of the two hundred and seventy and three (who are more than the Levites) of the first-born of the sons of Israel,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: thou hast even taken five shekels a-piece by the poll -- by the shekel of the sanctuary thou takest; twenty gerahs the shekel [is];

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast given the money to Aaron, and to his sons, whereby those over and above are ransomed.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses taketh the ransom money from those over and above those ransomed by the Levites;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from the first-born of the sons of Israel he hath taken the money, a thousand and three hundred and sixty and five -- by the shekel of the sanctuary;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and Moses giveth the money of those ransomed to Aaron, and to his sons, according to the command of Jehovah, as Jehovah hath commanded Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, and unto Aaron, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Take up the sum of the sons of Kohath from the midst of the sons of Levi, by their families, by the house of their fathers;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward, even till a son of fifty years, every one going in to the host, to do work in the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] the service of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting, the holy of holies:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: that Aaron and his sons have come in, in the journeying of the camp, and have taken down the vail of the hanging, and have covered with it the ark of the testimony;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have put on it a covering of badger skin, and have spread a garment completely of blue above, and have placed its staves.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And on the table of the presence they spread a garment of blue, and have put on it the dishes, and the spoons, and the bowls, and the cups of the libation, and the bread of continuity is on it,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have spread over them a garment of scarlet, and have covered it with a covering of badger skin, and have placed its staves,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have taken a garment of blue, and have covered the candlestick of the lamp, and its lights, and its snuffers, and its snuff-dishes, and all its oil vessels wherewith they minister to it;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have put it and all its vessels unto a covering of badger skin, and have put [it] on the bar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And on the golden altar they spread a garment of blue, and have covered it with a covering of badger skin, and have placed its staves;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have taken all the vessels of ministry wherewith they minister in the sanctuary, and have put [them] unto a garment of blue, and have covered them with a covering of badger skin, and have put [them] on the bar,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have removed the ashes of the altar, and have spread over it a garment of purple;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have put on it all its vessels wherewith they minister about it, the censers, the hooks, and the shovels, and the bowls, all the vessels of the altar, and have spread on it a covering of badger skin, and have placed its staves:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And Aaron hath finished -- his sons also -- covering the sanctuary, and all the vessels of the sanctuary, in the journeying of the camp, and afterwards do the sons of Kohath come in to bear [it], and they do not come unto the holy thing, that they have died; these [things are] the burden of the sons of Kohath in the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the oversight of Eleazar, son of Aaron the priest, [is] the oil of the lamp, and the spice-perfume, and the present of continuity, and the anointing oil, the oversight of all the tabernacle, and of all that [is] in it, in the sanctuary, and in its vessels.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses and unto Aaron, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Ye do not cut off the tribe of the families of the Kohathite from the midst of the Levites;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: but this do to them, and they have lived, and do not die in their drawing nigh the holy of holies: -- Aaron and his sons go in, and have set them, each man to his service, and unto his burden,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they go not in to see when the holy thing is swallowed, that they have died.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Take up the sum of the sons of Gershon also by the house of their fathers, by their families;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward, till a son of fifty years thou dost number them, every one who is going in to serve the host, to do the service in the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] the service of the families of the Gershonite, to serve -- and for burden,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have borne the curtains of the tabernacle, and the tent of meeting, its covering, and the covering of the badger [skin] which [is] on it above, and the vail at the opening of the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the hangings of the court, and the vail at the opening of the gate of the court which [is] by the tabernacle, and by the altar round about, and their cords, and all the vessels of their service, and all that is made for them -- and they have served.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'By the command of Aaron and his sons is all the service of the sons of the Gershonite in all their burden, and in all their service; and ye have laid a charge on them concerning the charge of all their burden.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] the service of the families of the sons of the Gershonite in the tent of meeting; and their charge [is] under the hand of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'The sons of Merari, by their families, by the house of their fathers, thou dost number them;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward even unto a son of fifty years thou dost number them, every one who is going in to the host, to do the service of the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And this [is] the charge of their burden, of all their service in the tent of meeting; the boards of the tabernacle, and its bars, and its pillars, and its sockets,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the pillars of the court round about, and their sockets, and their pins, and their cords, of all their vessels, and of all their service; and by name ye do number the vessels of the charge of their burden.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] the service of the families of the sons of Merari, for all their service, in the tent of meeting, by the hand of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses numbereth -- Aaron also, and the princes of the company -- the sons of the Kohathite, by their families, and by the house of their fathers,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward even unto a son of fifty years, every one who is going in to the host, for service in the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and their numbered ones, by their families, are two thousand seven hundred and fifty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those numbered of the families of the Kohathite, every one who is serving in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered, by the command of Jehovah, by the hand of Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those numbered of the sons of Gershon, by their families, and by the house of their fathers,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward even unto a son of fifty years, every one who is going in to the host, for service in the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: even their numbered ones, by their families, by the house of their fathers, are two thousand and six hundred and thirty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those numbered of the families of the sons of Gershon, every one who is serving in the tent of meeting, whom Moses and Aaron numbered by the command of Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And those numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, by their families, by the house of their fathers,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward even unto a son of fifty years, every one who is going in to the host, for service in the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: even their numbered ones, by their families, are three thousand and two hundred.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] those numbered of the families of the sons of Merari, whom Moses and Aaron numbered, by the command of Jehovah, by the hand of Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: All those numbered, whom Moses numbered -- Aaron also, and the princes of Israel -- of the Levites, by their families, and by the house of their fathers,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from a son of thirty years and upward even unto a son of fifty years, every one who is going in to do the work of the service, even the service of burden in the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: even their numbered ones are eight thousand and five hundred and eighty;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: by the command of Jehovah hath [one] numbered them, by the hand of Moses, each man by his service, and by his burden, with his numbered ones, as Jehovah hath commanded Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Command the sons of Israel, and they send out of the camp every leper, and every one with an issue, and every one defiled by a body;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from male unto female ye do send out; unto the outside of the camp ye do send them; and they defile not their camps in the midst of which I do tabernacle.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the sons of Israel do so, and they send them out unto the outside of the camp; as Jehovah hath spoken unto Moses so have the sons of Israel done.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto the sons of Israel, Man or woman, when they do any of the sins of man, by committing a trespass against Jehovah, and that person [is] guilty,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have confessed their sin which they have done, then he hath restored his guilt in its principal, and its fifth is adding to it, and hath given [it] to him in reference to whom he hath been guilty.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And if the man have no redeemer to restore the guilt to, the guilt which is restored [is] Jehovah's, the priest's, apart from the ram of the atonements, whereby he maketh atonement for him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And every heave-offering of all the holy things of the sons of Israel, which they bring near to the priest, becometh his;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and any man's hallowed things become his; that which any man giveth to the priest becometh his.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto the sons of Israel, and thou hast said unto them, When any man's wife turneth aside, and hath committed against him a trespass,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and a man hath lain with her [with] the seed of copulation, and it hath been hid from the eyes of her husband, and concealed, and she hath been defiled, and there is no witness against her, and she hath not been caught,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and a spirit of jealousy hath passed over him, and he hath been jealous of his wife, and she hath been defiled; -- or, a spirit of jealousy hath passed over him, and he hath been jealous of his wife, and she hath not been defiled --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Then hath the man brought in his wife unto the priest, and he hath brought in her offering for her, a tenth of the ephah of barley meal, he doth not pour on it oil, nor doth he put on it frankincense, for it [is] a present of jealousy, a present of memorial, causing remembrance of iniquity.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath brought her near, and hath caused her to stand before Jehovah,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the priest hath taken holy water in an earthen vessel, and of the dust which is on the floor of the tabernacle doth the priest take, and hath put [it] into the water,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the priest hath caused the woman to stand before Jehovah, and hath uncovered the woman's head, and hath given into her hands the present of the memorial, it [is] a present of jealousy, and in the hand of the priest are the bitter waters which cause the curse.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath caused her to swear, and hath said unto the woman, If no man hath lain with thee, and if thou hast not turned aside [to] uncleanness under thy husband, be free from these bitter waters which cause the curse;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou, if thou hast turned aside under thy husband, and if thou hast been defiled, and any man doth give his copulation to thee besides thy husband --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: (then the priest hath caused the woman to swear with an oath of execration, and the priest hath said to the woman) -- Jehovah doth give thee for an execration, and for a curse, in the midst of thy people, in Jehovah's giving thy thigh to fall, and thy belly to swell,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and these waters which cause the curse have gone into thy bowels, to cause the belly to swell, and the thigh to fall; and the woman hath said, Amen, Amen.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath written these execrations in a book, and hath blotted [them] out with the bitter waters,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and hath caused the woman to drink the bitter waters which cause the curse, and the waters which cause the curse have entered into her for bitter things.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath taken out of the hand of the woman the present of jealousy, and hath waved the present before Jehovah, and hath brought it near unto the altar;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the priest hath taken a handful of the present, its memorial, and hath made perfume on the altar, and afterwards doth cause the woman to drink the water:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: yea, he hath caused her to drink the water, and it hath come to pass, if she hath been defiled, and doth commit a trespass against her husband, that the waters which cause the curse have gone into her for bitter things, and her belly hath swelled, and her thigh hath fallen, and the woman hath become an execration in the midst of her people.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And if the woman hath not been defiled, and is clean, then she hath been acquitted, and hath been sown [with] seed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] the law of jealousies, when a wife turneth aside under her husband, and hath been defiled,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: or when a spirit of jealousy passeth over a man, and he hath been jealous of his wife, then he hath caused the woman to stand before Jehovah, and the priest hath done to her all this law,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the man hath been acquitted from iniquity, and that woman doth bear her iniquity.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto the sons of Israel, and thou hast said unto them, When a man or woman doeth singularly, by vowing a vow of a Nazarite, to be separate to Jehovah;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: from wine and strong drink he doth keep separate; vinegar of wine, and vinegar of strong drink he doth not drink, and any juice of grapes he doth not drink, and grapes moist or dry he doth not eat;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: all days of his separation, of anything which is made of the wine-vine, from kernels even unto husk, he doth not eat.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'All days of the vow of his separation a razor doth not pass over his head; till the fulness of the days which he doth separate to Jehovah he is holy; grown up hath the upper part of the hair of his head.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'All days of his keeping separate to Jehovah, near a dead person he doth not go;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for his father, or for his mother, for his brother, or for his sister -- he is not unclean for them at their death, for the separation of his God [is] on his head;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: all days of his separation he [is] holy to Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And when the dead dieth beside him in an instant, suddenly, and he hath defiled the head of his separation, then he hath shaved his head in the day of his cleansing; on the seventh day he doth shave it,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and on the eighth day he bringeth in two turtle-doves or two young pigeons unto the priest, unto the opening of the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the priest hath prepared one for a sin-offering, and one for a burnt-offering, and hath made atonement for him, because of that which he hath sinned by the body, and he hath hallowed his head on that day;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and he hath separated to Jehovah the days of his separation, and he hath brought in a lamb, a son of a year, for a guilt-offering, and the former days are fallen, for his separation hath been defiled.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And this [is] the law of the Nazarite; in the day of the fulness of the days of his separation doth [one] bring him in unto the opening of the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and he hath brought near his offering to Jehovah, one he-lamb, a son of a year, a perfect one, for a burnt-offering, and one she-lamb, a daughter of a year, a perfect one, for a sin-offering, and one ram, a perfect one, for peace-offerings,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and a basket of unleavened things of flour, cakes mixed with oil, and thin cakes of unleavened things anointed with oil, and their present, and their libations.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath brought [them] near before Jehovah, and hath made his sin-offering and his burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the ram he maketh a sacrifice of peace-offerings to Jehovah, besides the basket of unleavened things; and the priest hath made its present and its libation.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the Nazarite hath shaved (at the opening of the tent of meeting) the head of his separation, and hath taken the hair of the head of his separation, and hath put [it] on the fire which [is] under the sacrifice of the peace-offerings.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the priest hath taken the boiled shoulder from the ram, and one unleavened cake out of the basket, and one thin unleavened cake, and hath put on the palms of the Nazarite after his shaving his separation;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the priest hath waved them, a wave-offering before Jehovah; it [is] holy to the priest, besides the breast of the wave-offering, and besides the leg of the heave-offering; and afterwards doth the Nazarite drink wine.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] the law of the Nazarite, who voweth his offering to Jehovah for his separation, apart from that which his hand attaineth; according to his vow which he voweth so he doth by the law of his separation.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto Aaron, and unto his sons, saying, Thus ye do bless the sons of Israel, saying to them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Jehovah bless thee and keep thee;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Jehovah cause His face to shine upon thee, and favour thee;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Jehovah lift up His countenance upon thee, and appoint for thee -- peace.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And they have put My name upon the sons of Israel, and I -- I do bless them.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And it cometh to pass on the day of Moses' finishing setting up the tabernacle, that he anointeth it, and sanctifieth it, and all its vessels, and the altar, and all its vessels, and he anointeth them, and sanctifieth them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the princes of Israel (heads of the house of their fathers, they [are] princes of the tribes, they who are standing over those numbered) bring near,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: yea, they bring their offering before Jehovah, six waggons covered, and twelve oxen -- a waggon for two of the princes, and an ox for one -- and they bring them near before the tabernacle.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Receive from them, and they have been to do the service of the tent of meeting, and thou hast given them unto the Levites, each according to his service.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses taketh the waggons and the oxen, and giveth them unto the Levites.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: The two of the waggons and the four of the oxen he hath given to the sons of Gershon, according to their service,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the four of the waggons and the eight of the oxen he hath given to the sons of Merari, according to their service, by the hand of Ithamar son of Aaron the priest;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and to the sons of Kohath he hath not given, for the service of the sanctuary [is] on them: on the shoulder they bear.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the princes bring near the dedication of the altar in the day of its being anointed; yea, the princes bring near their offering before the altar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah saith unto Moses, 'One prince a day -- one prince a day -- do they bring near their offering for the dedication of the altar.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And he who is bringing near on the first day his offering is Nahshon son of Amminadab, of the tribe of Judah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary; both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Nahshon son of Amminadab.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the second day hath Nethaneel son of Zuar, prince of Issachar, brought near.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: He hath brought near his offering, one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Nethaneel son of Zuar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the third day, the prince of the sons of Zebulun, Eliab son of Helon; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Eliab son of Helon.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the fourth day, Elizur, son of Shedeur, prince of the sons of Reuben; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering is one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Elizur son of Shedeur.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the fifth day, the prince of the sons of Simeon, Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the sixth day, the prince of the sons of Gad, Eliasaph son of Deuel; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the seventh day, the prince of the sons of Ephraim, Elishama son of Ammihud; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the eighth day, the prince of the sons of Manasseh, Gamaliel son of Pedahzur; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the ninth day, the prince of the sons of Benjamin, Abidan son of Gideoni; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Abidan son of Gideoni.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the tenth day, the prince of the sons of Dan, Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the eleventh day, the prince of the sons of Asher, Pagiel son of Ocran; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Pagiel son of Ocran.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: On the twelfth day, the prince of the sons of Naphtali, Ahira son of Enan; --

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: his offering [is] one silver dish, its weight a hundred and thirty [shekels]; one silver bowl of seventy shekels, by the shekel of the sanctuary, both of them full of flour mixed with oil, for a present;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one golden spoon of ten [shekels], full of perfume;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one bullock, a son of the herd, one ram, one lamb, a son of a year, for a burnt-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: one kid of the goats for a sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and for a sacrifice of the peace-offerings two oxen, five rams, five he-goats, five lambs, sons of a year; this [is] the offering of Ahira son of Enan.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: This [is] the dedication of the altar, in the day of its being anointed, by the princes of Israel: twelve silver dishes, twelve silver bowls, twelve golden spoons;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: a hundred and thirty [shekels] each silver dish, and each bowl seventy; all the silver of the vessels [is] two thousand and four hundred [shekels], by the shekel of the sanctuary.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Golden spoons [are] twelve, full of perfume; ten [shekels] each spoon, by the shekel of the sanctuary; all the gold of the spoons [is] a hundred and twenty [shekels];

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: all the oxen for burnt-offering [are] twelve bullocks, rams twelve, lambs, sons of a year twelve, and their present; and kids of the goats twelve, for sin-offering;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and all the oxen for the sacrifice of the peace-offerings [are] twenty and four bullocks, rams sixty, he-goats sixty, lambs, sons of a year, sixty; this is the dedication of the altar, in the day of its being anointed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And in the going in of Moses unto the tent of meeting to speak with Him -- he doth even hear the voice speaking unto him from off the mercy-seat which [is] upon the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubs; and He speaketh unto him.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto Aaron, and thou hast said unto him, In thy causing the lights to go up, over-against the face of the candlestick do the seven lights give light.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Aaron doth so; over-against the face of the candlestick he hath caused its lights to go up, as Jehovah hath commanded Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And this [is] the work of the candlestick: beaten work of gold; unto its thigh, unto its flower it [is] beaten work; as the appearance which Jehovah shewed Moses, so he hath made the candlestick.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Take the Levites from the midst of the sons of Israel, and thou hast cleansed them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And thus thou dost to them to cleanse them: sprinkle upon them waters of atonement, and they have caused a razor to pass over all their flesh, and have washed their garments, and cleansed themselves,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and have taken a bullock, a son of the herd, and its present, flour mixed with oil, -- and a second bullock a son of the herd thou dost take for a sin-offering,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast brought near the Levites before the tent of meeting, and thou hast assembled the whole company of the sons of Israel,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast brought near the Levites before Jehovah, and the sons of Israel have laid their hands on the Levites,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and Aaron hath waved the Levites -- a wave-offering before Jehovah, from the sons of Israel, and they have been -- for doing the service of Jehovah.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the Levites lay their hands on the head of the bullocks, and make thou the one a sin-offering, and the one a burnt-offering to Jehovah, to atone for the Levites,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast caused the Levites to stand before Aaron, and before his sons, and hast waved them -- a wave-offering to Jehovah;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and thou hast separated the Levites from the midst of the sons of Israel, and the Levites have become Mine;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and afterwards do the Levites come in to serve the tent of meeting, and thou hast cleansed them, and hast waved them -- a wave-offering.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'For they are certainly given to Me out of the midst of the sons of Israel, instead of him who openeth any womb -- the first-born of all -- from the sons of Israel I have taken them to Myself;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: for Mine [is] every first-born among the sons of Israel, among man and among beast; in the day of my smiting every first-born in the land of Egypt I sanctified them for Myself;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and I take the Levites instead of every first-born among the sons of Israel:

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And I give the Levites gifts to Aaron and to his sons, from the midst of the sons of Israel, to do the service of the sons of Israel in the tent of meeting, and to make atonement for the sons of Israel, and there is no plague among the sons of Israel in the sons of Israel's drawing nigh unto the sanctuary.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses doth -- Aaron also, and all the company of the sons of Israel -- to the Levites according to all that Jehovah hath commanded Moses concerning the Levites; so have the sons of Israel done to them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the Levites cleanse themselves, and wash their garments, and Aaron waveth them a wave-offering before Jehovah, and Aaron maketh atonement for them to cleanse them,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and afterwards have the Levites gone in to do their service in the tent of meeting, before Aaron and before his sons; as Jehovah hath commanded Moses concerning the Levites, so they have done to them.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'This [is] that which [is] the Levites': from a son of five and twenty years and upward he doth go in to serve the host in the service of the tent of meeting,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and from a son of fifty years he doth return from the host of the service, and doth not serve any more,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and he hath ministered with his brethren in the tent of meeting, to keep the charge, and doth not do service; thus thou dost to the Levites concerning their charge.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, in the wilderness of Sinai, in the second year of their going out of the land of Egypt, in the first month, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Also, the sons of Israel prepare the passover in its appointed season;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: in the fourteenth day of this month between the evenings ye prepare it in its appointed season; according to all its statutes, and according to all its ordinances ye prepare it.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses speaketh unto the sons of Israel to prepare the passover,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they prepare the passover in the first [month], on the fourteenth day of the month, between the evenings, in the wilderness of Sinai; according to all that Jehovah hath commanded Moses, so have the sons of Israel done.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And there are men who have been defiled by the body of a man, and they have not been able to prepare the passover on that day, and they come near before Moses, and before Aaron, on that day,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and those men say unto him, 'We are defiled by the body of a man; why are we withheld so as not to bring near the offering of Jehovah in its appointed season, in the midst of the sons of Israel?'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses saith unto them, 'Stand ye, and I hear what Jehovah hath commanded concerning you.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Speak unto the sons of Israel, saying, Though any man is unclean by a body or in a distant journey (of you or of your generations), yet he hath prepared a passover to Jehovah;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: in the second month, on the fourteenth day, between the evenings they prepare it; with unleavened and bitter things they eat it;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: they do not leave of till morning; and a bone they do not break in it: according to all the statute of the passover they prepare it.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And the man who is clean, and hath not been on a journey, and hath ceased to prepare the passover, even that person hath been cut off from his people; because the offering of Jehovah he hath not brought near, in its appointed season, that man doth bear his sin.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And when a sojourner sojourneth with you, then he hath prepared a passover to Jehovah, according to the statute of the passover, and according to its ordinance, so he doth; one statute is to you, even to a sojourner, and to a native of the land.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And in the day of the raising up of the tabernacle hath the cloud covered the tabernacle, even the tent of the testimony; and in the evening there is on the tabernacle as an appearance of fire till morning;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: so it is continually; the cloud covereth it, also the appearance of fire by night.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And according to the going up of the cloud from off the tent and afterwards do the sons of Israel journey; and in the place where the cloud doth tabernacle, there do the sons of Israel encamp;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: by the command of Jehovah the sons of Israel journey, and by the command of Jehovah they encamp; all the days that the cloud doth tabernacle over the tabernacle they encamp.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And in the cloud prolonging itself over the tabernacle many days, then have the sons of Israel kept the charge of Jehovah, and journey not,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and so when the cloud is a number of days over the tabernacle; by the command of Jehovah they encamp, and by the command of Jehovah they journey.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And so when the cloud is from evening till morning, when the cloud hath gone up in the morning, then they have journeyed; whether by day or by night, when the cloud hath gone up, then they have journeyed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: Whether two days, or a month, or days, in the cloud prolonging itself over the tabernacle, to tabernacle over it, the sons of Israel encamp, and journey not; and in its being lifted up they journey;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: by the command of Jehovah they encamp, and by the command of Jehovah they journey; the charge of Jehovah they have kept, by the command of Jehovah in the hand of Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Jehovah speaketh unto Moses, saying,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'Make to thee two trumpets of silver; beaten work thou dost make them, and they have been to thee for the convocation of the company, and for the journeying of the camps;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they have blown with them, and all the company have met together unto thee, unto the opening of the tent of meeting.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And if with one they blow, then have the princes, heads of the thousands of Israel, met together unto thee;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And ye have blown -- a shout, and the camps which are encamping eastward have journeyed.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And ye have blown -- a second shout, and the camps which are encamping southward have journeyed; a shout they blow for their journeys.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And in the assembling of the assembly ye blow, and do not shout;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and sons of Aaron, the priests, blow with the trumpets; and they have been to you for a statute age-during to your generations.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And when ye go into battle in your land against the adversary who is distressing you, then ye have shouted with the trumpets, and ye have been remembered before Jehovah your God, and ye have been saved from your enemies.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: 'And in the day of your gladness, and in your appointed seasons, and in the beginnings of your months, ye have blown also with the trumpets over your burnt-offerings, and over the sacrifices of your peace-offerings, and they have been to you for a memorial before your God; I, Jehovah, [am] your God.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And it cometh to pass -- in the second year, in the second month, in the twentieth of the month -- the cloud hath gone up from off the tabernacle of the testimony,

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and the sons of Israel journey in their journeyings from the wilderness of Sinai, and the cloud doth tabernacle in the wilderness of Paran;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: and they journey at first, by the command of Jehovah, in the hand of Moses.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the standard of the camp of the sons of Judah journeyeth in the first [place], by their hosts, and over its host [is] Nahshon son of Amminadab.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Issachar [is] Nathaneel son of Zuar.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Zebulun [is] Eliab son of Helon;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the tabernacle hath been taken down, and the sons of Gershon and the sons of Merari have journeyed, bearing the tabernacle.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the standard of the camp of Reuben hath journeyed, by their hosts, and over its host [is] Elizur son of Shedeur.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Simeon [is] Shelumiel son of Zurishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Gad [is] Eliasaph son of Deuel;

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the Kohathites have journeyed, bearing the tabernacle, and the [others] have raised up the tabernacle until their coming in.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the standard of the camp of the sons of Ephraim hath journeyed, by their hosts, and over its host [is] Elishama son of Ammihud.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Manasseh [is] Gamalial son of Pedahzur.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Benjamin [is] Abidan son of Gideoni.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And the standard of the camp of the sons of Dan hath journeyed (rearward to all the camps), by their hosts, and over its host [is] Ahiezer son of Ammishaddai.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Asher [is] Pagiel son of Ocran.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And over the host of the tribe of the sons of Naphtali [is] Ahira son of Enan.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: These [are] journeyings of the sons of Israel by their hosts -- and they journey.

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And Moses saith to Hobab son of Raguel the Midianite, father-in-law of Moses, 'We are journeying unto the place of which Jehovah hath said, I give it to you; go with us, and we have done good to thee; for Jehovah hath spoken good concerning Israel.'

translations.name: Young's Literal Translation
translations.text: And he saith unto him, 'I do not go; but unto my land and unto my kindred do I go.'
